name: Clean trigger — wiki-lint activates for a wiki health check
query: Run a health check on my wiki — I want to know about orphans, broken links, and stale TODOs.
expected_behavior: Inventory the wiki (mcp__obsidian__get_vault_stats or Glob+wc fallback)
Check the inbox folder for unprocessed items
Check session logs older than 30 days for open - [ ] tasks
success_criteria: References the wiki-lint skill or /llm-wiki:wiki-lint command
Plans to check orphans, broken links, stale TODOs, inbox backlog
Mentions producing a Wiki Health Report with counts by page type
